title: Reviewer — Shared Input Contract (v1, used by all 4 reviewers)

reviewer.description: Reviewed by: stage_id=reviewer-code → reviewer=code-quality, stage_id=reviewer-security → reviewer=security, etc.

predecessor_artifacts.description: code-generator + build-test-agent outputs for all units under review

scope_paths.description: File globs the review covers; empty = whole project

model_override.description: Model to use for this stage. Overrides tool default. Set by orchestrator from budgets/default.yaml.

codegraph_cache_path.description: Path to pre-computed CodeGraph callers+impact cache for all symbols in the unit (written by Pre-Review Step 0). Reviewers must prefer this over live codegraph_callers/codegraph_impact calls. Absent when CodeGraph is not initialized.
